cards.title: Lead Scoring & Routing
cards.body: Every Zillow, Realtor.com, and site-form lead gets scored on intent signals — timeline, financing, neighborhood specificity — and routed to the right agent in under 60 seconds with a drafted first-touch SMS. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd tune the scoring weights against your last 6 months of closed vs. dead leads so the model reflects what actually converts for your team.
cards.metric: 3–5× faster first response; ~25% lift in booked showings

cards.title: MLS ↔ Website Listing Sync
cards.body: New listings, price changes, and status flips propagate from MLS to your site, social scheduler, and email drip in one pass — with auto-generated copy variants per channel. No more stale 'available' listings embarrassing you on Instagram two weeks after they closed.
cards.metric: Listings live across channels in <10 min vs. 2–3 days

cards.title: Drip Nurture + Showing Reminders
cards.body: Leads who aren't ready today get a 12-touch drip tailored to their stated neighborhood and price band, and anyone with a scheduled showing gets SMS + calendar reminders 24h and 1h out. Re-engagement is triggered automatically when they revisit a listing.
cards.metric: ~40% of cold leads re-engage within 90 days

ctaLine: Typical build is 3–4 weeks for a brokerage of 10–50 agents. Book a call — we'll show you the exact pipeline running on our own test MLS feed.
